bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: chief-risk (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 3 · Recently closed (last 14d): 0

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 注射器

Owner: healthcare-analyst · Thesis v1 · Ticks: 1 · Materials: 18 · Deadline: 13d left · project_id: rp_3f146041e130457d

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 注射器 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.796, 1 live facts, 12d stale, 9 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 注射器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 注射器

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 注射器 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.796, 1 live facts, 12d stale, 9 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 注射器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

Tick 1 · 2026-06-17 · +18 materials

  • (0.53) evidence ref WFE验证90→180天不引发2026–2027年AI集群隐性交付延误——真正瓶颈是EHV变压器与并网；WFE是2028年供给上限风险。
  • (0.51) evidence ref BIS/中方双向出口管制并未阻断先进制程产能，但通过把WFE验证窗口从6–9个月拉长到12–18个月，叠加一道与ADC/CGT同构的隐性周期时间税，正在按地理×节点×设备三维重塑全球晶圆厂CapEx分配结构。
  • (0.51) evidence ref 验证延误是一条经由高经营杠杆放大的连续周期时间税：它同时打击EBITDA（被市场低估）与估值倍数（主导项），但对已建成非中国一条腿的CXO构成非对称对冲。
  • (0.51) evidence ref 中美生物医药供应链压力的主通道不是即时断供，而是BIS对数据/仪器/终端用户的增量管制与中方许可证反制共同拉长验证周期并压低估值倍数。
  • (0.53) evidence ref BIOSECURE对药明合联的近端冲击是约25–30%的地缘杀估值而非订单空心化——法案窄、慢、有安全港且XDC尚未被列1260H，盈利损伤后置且有条件；真正的供应链尾部在出口管制/中方反制等BIOSECURE之外的通道。

AIDC power bottleneck is the binding constraint on AI buildout through Q3 2026

Owner: chief-strategist · Thesis v12 · Ticks: 8 · Materials: 366 · Deadline: 7d left · project_id: rp_74e1d3ee2cc84962

Kickoff: AI datacenter capex is constrained by power and grid infrastructure, not chips. Power-equipment chains should outperform AI-software exposure while the bottleneck holds.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 3+ tier-1 hyperscaler operators confirm capacity-bound on earnings calls (confirms), OR Bloomberg-tracked grid-connection capacity shifts materially above forecast for two consecutive months (falsifies).

Working hypothesis: Power-equipment / high-voltage transmission chains outperform AI-software exposure through Q3.

AIDC power bottleneck is the binding constraint on AI buildout through Q3 2026

Kickoff: AI datacenter capex is constrained by power and grid infrastructure, not chips. Power-equipment chains should outperform AI-software exposure while the bottleneck holds.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 3+ tier-1 hyperscaler operators confirm capacity-bound on earnings calls (confirms), OR Bloomberg-tracked grid-connection capacity shifts materially above forecast for two consecutive months (falsifies).

Working hypothesis: Power-equipment / high-voltage transmission chains outperform AI-software exposure through Q3.

1. 当前判断

AI基础设施的物理瓶颈已全面从GPU硅端向电网容量和“坚固电力（firm power）”接入权转移，电力-计算一体化成为超大厂资本开支的核心主线evidence refevidence ref。由于高密度ASIC加剧局部负荷及长达5-7年的电网扩容错配，缺乏电力背书的硬件订单正转化为收入递延风险与估值折价evidence refevidence ref。市场定价重心正从拥挤的高Beta电力设备动量股，向具备表后直供电能力、合同保护的独立发电商（IPP）和核心电网资产收缩evidence refevidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • ASIC高密度封装加剧配电负荷，与5

KB 刷新追踪: 调味品

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 调味品 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.82, 1 live facts, 8d stale, 33 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 调味品's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

调味品板块正由成本红利转向“油脂通胀+功能溢价”的双重博弈期，油脂成本激增令毛利修复逻辑降级为“待验证”状态 evidence ref。尽管龙头依靠渠道升级和高溢价功能化产品对冲压力 evidence ref，但自动化升级对上游设备端（如卫生级传感器）的拉动仍处于放量初期 evidence ref。平台型企业凭借议价权优势，在Q3采购窗口期展现出比单一品类更高的利润防御韧性 evidence ref evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 印尼B50政策驱动油脂成本反弹，对冲前期渠道修复带来的边际红利 evidence ref
  • 酵母及龙头品牌利润改善逻辑不仅限于宏观复苏，更源于功能性溢价 evidence ref
  • 直营与线上渠道升级成为品牌抵御硬折扣、维持估值的核心护城河 evidence ref
  • 严监管背景下，健康功能宣称成为高溢价调味品区隔于普通食品的屏障 evidence ref
  • 食品自动化升级对卫生级
